---
title: Terms
# date: 2022-12-26
# description-meta: Guorui is working on a bunch of exciting and groundbreaking projects
published-title: Last updated
title-block-banner: "#212529"
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
---


### Likely pathogenic/benign

“likely pathogenic” and “likely benign” be used to mean greater than 90% certainty of a variant either being disease- causing or benign

It should also be noted that at present most variants do not have data to support a quan- titative assignment of variant certainty to any of the five cat- egories given the heterogeneous nature of most diseases.

### Mutation
Mutation is defined as a permanent change in the nucleotide sequence.

### Polymorphism

Polymorphism is defined as a vari- ant with a frequency above 1%.
